title: Section 15N
content: 1[15N. Tenure of office of Presiding Office, Judicial or Technical Members of Securities Appellate Tribunal.--The Presiding Officer or every Judicial or Technical Member of the Securities Appellate Tribunal shall hold office for a term of five years from the date on which he enters upon his office, and shall be eligible for reappointment for another term of maximum five years: Provided that no Presiding Officer or the Judicial or Technical Member shall hold office after he has attained the age of seventy years.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 7 of 2017, s.148, for section 15N (w.e.f. 26-5-2017).
